lanes.label: Fast / high impact
lanes.transformation: Small dice → ripping-hot sear → deep golden edges → optional sugar + acid deglaze → cool to crisp shards
lanes.payoff: Crunch + Maillard; reads intentional on the clock
lanes.bestUse: Need contrast vs soft custard/purée; competition plates under ~40 min
lanes.risk: Dry-blast too long → rubber; balance oil + heat

lanes.label: Balanced / quick sear
lanes.transformation: Thin slice → hot pan sear → light browning → finish in sauce or on tart
lanes.payoff: Soft protein with some crust — safe, readable
lanes.bestUse: Sandwich/bowl logic; when crunch isn’t the headline
lanes.risk: Soft-on-soft if the rest of the plate is also creamy
lanes.clockHint: OK when another element carries crunch

lanes.label: Deep flavor / slow
lanes.transformation: Simmer or braise in seasoned liquid → moist, flavored pieces
lanes.bestUse: Curry, stew, saucy mains when clock allows
lanes.risk: Eats clock on tight rounds; weak as “slice on top” garnish
lanes.clockHint: Risky for ≤30 min unless pressure or pre-cooked called out

lanes.label: Fast / high impact
lanes.transformation: Crumble or small dice → brown hard in oil → spice + splash acid

lanes.label: Balanced / sear
lanes.transformation: Slice → sear both sides → glaze or stack
lanes.risk: Bland center if under-seasoned (esp. no salt rounds)

lanes.label: Deep / braise
lanes.transformation: Simmer in aromatic liquid → absorb flavor

lanes.label: Fast / high impact
lanes.transformation: Small wedges → high-heat roast or hot pan → char + maple glaze finish
lanes.risk: Undercooked center if pieces too thick

lanes.label: Balanced / roast + blend
lanes.transformation: Roast until tender → scoop → purée or fold into filling
lanes.payoff: Silky-sweet body for tarts, soups, sauces
lanes.risk: Stacks with dough + bake — watch total clock
lanes.clockHint: Pair with store crust or stovetop-set custard

lanes.label: Deep / concentrate
lanes.transformation: Long roast → reduce purée → butter/oil finish
lanes.risk: Rarely fits tight competition clocks end-to-end

lanes.label: Fast / high impact
lanes.transformation: Brush + quick broil or torch → spot caramel; or whisk with acid for instant glaze
lanes.clockHint: No-salt rounds: pair acid in same step

lanes.label: Balanced / reduction
lanes.transformation: Reduce with citrus, vinegar, or spice → sauce body

lanes.label: Deep / candy
lanes.transformation: Cook to soft-ball / caramel stage → shard, brittle, or ribbon
lanes.clockHint: Adds clock load — plan parallel work

lanes.label: Fast / high impact
lanes.transformation: Simmer with acid (citrus) or mustard → quick pan sauce; or whip soft for dollop

lanes.label: Balanced / set
lanes.transformation: Blend into custard base with eggs → gentle bake or stovetop thicken
lanes.timeCost: Bake time varies — budget with crust
lanes.clockHint: Crustless or bought shell saves minutes

lanes.label: Deep / reduce
lanes.transformation: Slow reduction → almost glaze → mount butter or oil
